Rule.name: six_finish_selected_workitems
Rule.Description: Batch approve or reject of workitems

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the query executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: requester
Argument.Description: Name of the work item requester

Argument.name: owner
Argument.Description: Name of the work item owner

Argument.name: filter
Argument.Description: Sailpoint filter expression template to do additional work item selection. Default: state.isNull()

Argument.name: selector
Argument.Description: CerberusLogic rules to further narrow down the work items selection

Argument.name: ordering
Argument.Description: Comma separated list of attributes to sort the work items by. Append " desc" to an attribute for reverse ordering. Default: workflowCase.modified desc, created

Argument.name: action
Argument.Description: Action to take on the work item or leave empty to have them listed only

Argument.name: maxRows
Argument.Description: Maximum number of work items to process

Argument.name: maxRetries
Argument.Description: Maximum number of processing retries (10 s interval). Default: 10

Argument.name: runInBackground
Argument.Description: Enable for long-running queries to get the result sent by email
